# Vendored libraries

- `confetti.module.mjs`: [canvas-confetti](https://github.com/catdad/canvas-confetti) v1.9.3
  (ISC license), the ESM build from
  <https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/canvas-confetti@1.9.3/dist/confetti.module.mjs>.
  Vendored because cdn.skypack.dev stopped serving it reliably
  ("TypeError: Failed to fetch dynamically imported module").
